chapters.title: Quiet Invitation
chapters.content: During her trip to Kyoto, Olivia was invited to attend a traditional tea ceremony. She expected tea, but discovered it was much more than that.During her trip to Kyoto, Olivia was invited to attend a traditional tea ceremony. chapters.title: Every Movement Matters
chapters.content: The host prepared the tea slowly and carefully. Every movement had meaning, and silence became part of the experience.The host prepared the tea slowly and carefully. chapters.title: A Different Kind of Peace
chapters.content: When the ceremony ended, Olivia felt unexpectedly calm. Sometimes the simplest rituals teach the deepest lessons.When the ceremony ended, Olivia felt unexpectedly calm.
